Singer: Benny Dayal, D. Imman

Lyricist: Yugabharathi		 Other Songs Lyrics
Soi Soi Soi SoiA lady with violin (ayayyayyo female)Ayayayoo AananthameyOnnum PuriyalaNee eppo pullaSollitaaley Ava KaadhalaYella Oorum
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Yella oorum engalukku sondha oorunga
yaanaiyoda sethu naanga naalu perunga
Nambikaiya nambi unga vaazhka oodudhu
thumbikaiye nambi enga kaalam oodudhu

Ninna edathula soru
neeti padukayil thookkam
enna edhu nadanthalum... siripomey

Kannu mulichadhum vela
kaiya virichadhum kooli
alli kodupathu neenga…..madhipomey

Veedhi yellaam suthi vitha kaaturomunga
veliyillaa kaatta pola vaazhuromunga
yaana balam venumunu sonnathaarunga?
enga balam yaanaiyinu solluvomunga

Mungi kulichida aaru
mutta nadanthida roadu
lungi madipula beedi,olipomey

Nalla thuni kidaiyaadhu
thanga idam kidaiyaadhu
unga rasipulla naanga …polaipomey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yella Oorum'?

The song 'Yella Oorum' celebrates unity and joy, reflecting the essence of togetherness in life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Kumki?

In Kumki, the song is a lively expression of the characters' happiness and their connection to their surroundings.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by D Imman.

When was 'Yella Oorum' released?

'Yella Oorum' was released on August 28, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Yella Oorum', the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the joyous moments shared by the characters in Kumki. The upbeat melody and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for festive occasions. The song conveys a sense of unity and togetherness, inviting listeners to embrace life's joyful moments. Benny Dayal's lively rendition, combined with D Imman's catchy composition, ensures that this track remains a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yella Oorum from Kumki is a vibrant celebration of life and togetherness, brought to life by the soulful voice of Benny Dayal. This track perfectly encapsulates the joyous spirit of the movie, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood. With D Imman's catchy composition and Yugabharathi's engaging lyrics, this song is sure to resonate with listeners of all ages.
stanzaMeanings: Every town has its own elephants, and we are four people who are connected to them. Trusting in your life, we believe that everything will go well.
Wherever you go, there is food waiting for you, and no matter what happens, we will always smile.
Even if your eyes are closed and your hands are open, you will still receive what you deserve.
We will roam around the streets and enjoy life, as if we are not bound by anything. They say we need strength, but we will call it our strength.
To enjoy life, we need to be carefree and not worry about anything. We will live happily without any restrictions.
It's not easy to find a good place to rest, and we are not lucky enough to have it. We are just like you.
